SessionStart.command: echo '[governance-strict] active: final responses must include explicit validation outcomes and skipped-check reasons.'

UserPromptSubmit.command: echo '[governance-strict] enforce: keep layering boundaries, no secrets/customer data, no emoji in code/logging/comments, and Python-first cross-platform automation.'

Stop.command: echo '[governance-strict] gate: verify get_errors clean for changed files and report any unvalidated checks.'
